Toggle navigation Alternaria solani (ALTESO) Menu Overview → Reporting Photos Documents Overview Code created in: 2002-02-01 Basic information EPPO Code: ALTESO Preferred name: Alternaria solani Authority: Sorauer Other scientific names Name Authority Alternaria porri f. sp. solani Neergård Macrosporium solani Ellis & G.Martin Common names Name Language early blight of eggplant English early blight of potato English Blattfleckenkrankheit: Eierfrucht German Dürrfleckenkrankheit: Kartoffel German Hartfäule: Kartoffel German alternariose de la pomme de terre French alternariose des solanacées French brûlure alternarienne de la pomme de terre French tizón temprano Spanish tizón temprano de las papas Spanish альтернариоз картофеля Russian alternarioza ziemniaka Polish pomidorų sausligė Lithuanian more photos... Taxonomy Kingdom Fungi      (
      1FUNGK      ) Phylum Ascomycota      (
      1ASCOP      ) Subphylum Pezizomycotina      (
      1PEZIQ      ) Class Dothideomycetes      (
      1DOTHC      ) Subclass Pleosporomycetidae      (
      1PLEOL      ) Order Pleosporales      (
      1PLEOO      ) Family Pleosporaceae      (
      1PLEOF      ) Genus Alternaria      (
      1ALTEG      ) Species Alternaria solani      (
      ALTESO      )

seed.symptoms: Concentric ring 'bull's eye' lesions on older lower leaves; yellowing around lesions; stem lesions near soil line.
seed.causes: Fungus Alternaria solani; favored by warm temperatures and alternating wet/dry; worsened by nutritional stress.
seed.treatment: Chlorothalonil, mancozeb, or copper fungicides applied at 7-10 day intervals.
seed.prevention: Crop rotation; mulching; adequate calcium and nitrogen; remove infected plant matter.
